!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (3) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2304 jsxChildrenSingleChildConfusableWithMultipleChildrenNoError.tsx:12:13: Cannot find name 'div'.
!!! related TS2304 jsxChildrenSingleChildConfusableWithMultipleChildrenNoError.tsx:19:28: Cannot find name 'div'.
!!! related TS2304 jsxChildrenSingleChildConfusableWithMultipleChildrenNoError.tsx:20:31: Cannot find name 'div'.
==== jsxChildrenSingleChildConfusableWithMultipleChildrenNoError.tsx (0 errors) ====
    /// <reference path="/.lib/react16.d.ts" />
    
    import * as React from 'react'
    
    type Tab = [string, React.ReactNode]  // [tabName, tabContent]
    
    interface Props {
        children: Tab[]
    }
    
    function TabLayout(props: Props) {
        return <div/>
    }
    
    export class App extends React.Component<{}> {
        render() {
            return <TabLayout>
                {[
                    ['Users', <div/>],
                    ['Products', <div/>]
                ]}
            </TabLayout>
        }
    }
